changelog:
• New: pick an icon (person, face, headphones, music note...) as your profile picture. Tap your avatar in the account card to open the picker. Stored on this device — switch back to your Google photo any time.
• Fix: cloud sync sometimes got stuck on "Syncing…" forever when the Vocalex local database took too long to respond. The snapshot step is now time-bounded so a slow read can no longer wedge the engine.
• Photo failures now fall back to your initials gradient instead of showing a broken-image placeholder.
